text.title: GitOps — Repository Structure Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Each env has a full copy of manifests; bug fixed in one, missed in two.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to base + overlays per workload.

antipattern.symptom: Team A's ConfigMap collides with Team B's; debug blocked.
Engineer edits prod overlay outside PR; rollback impossible.
antipattern.fix: Enforce branch protection on prod path; require PR.

antipattern.symptom: Future operator can't determine why staging differs from prod.
antipattern.fix: Add README per overlay with purpose + divergence rationale.
